_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Activation of ERK in PCB-Gal4+ neurons increased CO 2 production, as assayed by respirometry (Fig. 7e), partially phenocopying the effect of knocking down Nf1 in these neurons
details: Activation of ERK in PCB-Gal4+ neurons increased CO2 production (p < 0.001), partially phenocopying Nf1 knockdown effects
